prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-POLISHINGWHEEL-2IN-IR-TT Product Type: ABRASIVE_WHEELS Brand (from catalog): ToolTreaux Existing Title: ToolTreaux Cloth Polishing Buffing Wheel for Drill 2 Inch Diameter Soft Muslin Description: The ToolTreaux buffing and polishing wheel features 40 soft cloth layers to ensure that your items are polished effectively and softly. These wheels are ideal for polishing gems, stones, jewelry and precious metals.

The buffing wheel has a 1/4" hex round shaft that is designed to help prevent the wheel from slipping during use. It will fit most standard hobby and home improvement drills.

Our efficient buffing and polishing tool is made of durable yet soft muslin cloth that will increase the thickness of the wheel, ensuring a long life and is great for deburring and surface polishing precious items.

Although this polishing wheel was originally designed for jewelry making, you can also use it as a buffing pad for cleaning coins, hobby tools, locksmithing tools, gunsmithing and even archaeological finds. Search Terms: buffing wheel polishing wheel for drill drill bit set drill bit extension drill bit holder jewelry making kit jewelry making supplies beading and jewelry making gems coin collecting buffing pads buffing compound polishing pad drill polishing Features: - 40 PLY POLISHING WHEEL - ToolTreaux polishing wheel features 40 soft cloth layers to ensure your items are polished softly and effectively. Ideal for polishing precious metals, jewelry, gems and stones for jewelry making - NON-SLIP DESIGN - Buffing and polishing wheel has a 1/4" hex round shaft that will help prevent the wheel from slipping during use. Will fit most standard home improvement and hobby drills - DURABLE YET SOFT CONSTRUCTION - Efficient buffing and polishing tool is made of a metal drill bit and non-metallic soft muslin cloth that will increase the thickness ensuring a long life, and is ideal for deburring and surface polishing - VERSATILE BUFFING TOOL - Originally designed for jewelry making and polishing, but buffing pads are great for buffing and cleaning coins, hobby tools, archaeological items, locksmith tools and gunsmithing - SPECIFICATIONS - Color: cream, chrome; Material: metal, soft muslin cloth; Number of layers: 40; Shaft: 1/4"; Dimensions: 2" x 2" x 2"; Weight: .1lbs (1.6oz) === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ToolTreaux 2 Inch Cream Soft Muslin Polishing Wheel

anthropic.title_differentiation: 40-Ply Cloth Layers, 14 Inch Hex Shaft, Jewelry Polishing, Gems And Precious Metals, Drill Compatible
